command:
from PIL import Image
import os

path = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), 'Desktop', 'restaurant_banner_v2.png')
if not os.path.exists(path):
    print('ERROR: File not found!')
else:
    img = Image.open(path)
    size_bytes = os.path.getsize(path)
    print(f'Path: {path}')
    print(f'Dimensions: {img.size[0]}x{img.size[1]}')
    print(f'File size: {size_bytes} bytes ({size_bytes/1024:.1f} KB)')
    print(f'Format: {img.format}')
    print(f'Mode: {img.mode}')
    # Check center area for text (non-black pixels)
    center_y = img.size[1] // 2
    center_x = img.size[0] // 2
    pixels = []
    for dx in range(-200, 201, 50):
        px = img.getpixel((center_x + dx, center_y))
        pixels.append(px)
    has_text = any(p[0] > 100 or p[1] > 100 or p[2] > 100 for p in pixels)
    print(f'Text detected in center: {has_text}')
    print(f'Center pixels sample: {pixels[:5]}')
    # Check borders
    border_px = img.getpixel((15, 15))
    print(f'Border area pixel (15,15): {border_px}')
    border_px2 = img.getpixel((25, 25))
    print(f'Border area pixel (25,25): {border_px2}')
    print('Verification PASSED' if img.size == (1920, 1080) and has_text else 'Verification FAILED')
description: التحقق من جودة الصورة: الأبعاد، وجود النص، الحدود
